cover.script: Here's what's new on the scheduling board. These release notes start with a drag and drop fix.

slides.title: The Snap-Back Flash, Gone
slides.body: Move a job onto another technician's lane and the block appears at its new time immediately. Before, the drop animation painted it back at its old time for a moment, with a duplicate lingering in the lane you dragged from. Both are gone. The confirm dialog now opens over a board that already reads correctly.
slides.script: Drag a job into another technician's lane and it lands where you put it. It stays there. The old animation used to snap the block back to its original time for a beat, and leave a ghost copy sitting in the lane you dragged from. Both of those are fixed. By the time the confirm dialog opens, the board underneath it already tells the truth.

outro.headline: dispatch-schedule-ui News
outro.subline: Full release notes at the link below.
outro.script: Full notes at the link below. Subscribe so you catch the next one.
